articles.title: Review and setlist: Leslie Odom Jr. brings Broadway to the Boston Pops
articles.description:
At a sublime show Friday, Odom Jr. cemented his status as the latest legend to play with the Pops.

The post Review and setlist: Leslie Odom Jr. brings Broadway to the Boston Pops appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Leslie Odom Jr. performed with the Boston Pops on May 24, 2026.
The concert showcased Broadway hits, enhancing Boston's cultural scene.
Odom Jr.'s performance solidified his status as a key figure in local arts.

articles.title: Chelsea man facing slew of assault charges for alleged violence against young children
articles.description:
The defendant allegedly burned one child with a cigarette lighter and another with what appeared to be a heated fork.

The post Chelsea man facing slew of assault charges for alleged violence against young children appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Chelsea man charged with multiple assaults against young children, including severe burns.
Defendant allegedly used a cigarette lighter and heated fork on victims.
Case raises concerns about child safety in Chelsea and surrounding Boston areas.
